projects.name: Octocat Onboarding Portal
projects.recentActivity: Completed accessibility audit and merged PR #42.
projects.description: A self-service onboarding portal that guides new contributors through repository setup, coding standards, and their first pull request.

projects.name: Actions Workflow Library
projects.recentActivity: Published v2.1.0 of the reusable workflow collection.
projects.description: A curated library of reusable GitHub Actions workflows for CI, CD, and security scanning across all internal repositories.

projects.name: Copilot Prompt Handbook
projects.recentActivity: Added ten new prompt patterns for test generation.
projects.description: Living documentation of best-practice Copilot prompts, organised by task type and reviewed monthly by the developer experience team.

projects.name: Dependency Upgrade Sprint
projects.recentActivity: Three packages blocked on upstream breaking changes — escalated to maintainers.
projects.description: Quarterly initiative to upgrade all first-party package dependencies to their latest stable versions and resolve any breaking-change migrations.

projects.name: Mobile Responsive Redesign
projects.recentActivity: Design review flagged contrast issues on the card component — revisions in progress.
projects.description: Full responsive overhaul of the main dashboard to meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards and support viewports from 360 px to 1440 px.

projects.name: Legacy API Deprecation
projects.recentActivity: Waiting on legal sign-off before sending deprecation notices to external consumers.
projects.description: Planned retirement of the v1 REST API endpoints, requiring coordinated communication to all registered third-party integrators.
